project.name: Titan AI
project.description: Autonomous software engineering operating system, implemented as Titan Core: seven cooperating engines (Planner, Orchestrator, Context, Knowledge, Execution, Validation, Learning). See architecture.md Section 6 and decisions.md ADR-0002.

next_phase.name: Knowledge Engine Implementation
next_phase.blocked_reason: Waiting for the Context Engine implementation and verification to be completed.

tech_stack.notes: Selected TypeScript with Node.js, npm workspaces, Vitest, ESLint, and Prettier for the initial Titan AI monorepo scaffold (see tech_stack.md and ADR-0003).

architecture.notes: architecture.md Section 6 still defines the approved Titan Core engine architecture (7 engines). The initial scaffold now reflects that structure through placeholder engine packages.

titan_core.notes: Implementation order follows architecture.md Section 6.1's data-flow dependencies: Context and Knowledge first, then Planner, Orchestrator, Execution, Validation, and Learning last.

human_action_required: Review the initial monorepo scaffold and confirm whether CI workflows or pre-commit hooks should be added in a follow-up step.
